channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Naomi Osaka says she won't "hang around" in tennis if the results don't come
item.description: Four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka says she won’t “hang around” in tennis if her results fail to match her high expectations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Notre Dame's Danny Nelson scores twice, defending champ US beats Latvia 5-1 in world junior hockey
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Notre Dame forward Danny Nelson scored twice, Western Michigan’s Hampton Slukynsky made 25 saves and the defending champion United States beat Latvia 5-1 on Saturday in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers eliminated from NFC playoffs before game against Miami. Cowboys, Saints, Cardinals also out
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The defending NFC champion San Francisco 49ers were eliminated from the playoffs before their game at Miami began on Sunday because of victories by Washington and the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Panthers use short-handed goals to beat Lightning 4-2 in opener of home-and-home set
item.description: A.J. Greer and Eetu Luostarinen scored short-handed goals 42 seconds apart in the second period to help the Florida Panthers beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-2 on Sunday to open a home-and-home series.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods and son Charlie share the lead at PNC Championship in Orlando
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods and 15-year-old son Charlie ran off five straight birdies on the back nine Saturday for a 13-under 59 in the scramble format, giving them a share of the lead in the PNC Championship in Woods' first competition since back surgery in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
